claims.summary: A phase artifact should carry transition type, spectral signature, vectors, duration, subjective texture, friction, and lineage.
claims.disposition: verify current transition card, signature, slow-texture, joint-lineage, and reply lifecycle tests

claims.summary: Subjective texture and observed structural evidence must remain separately weighted and attributable.
claims.disposition: implement and test dual_perspective_v1 provenance parents and relation state

claims.summary: Capability and delta requests can be previewed but must not be applied by a transition card.
claims.disposition: verify transition_capabilities_v1, transition_gate_v1, and delta_impact_preview_v1 remain unapplied

claims.summary: A behavioral unlock or automatic mode change requires live authority.
claims.disposition: retain behavior_unlock_applied=false and gate any live path behind exact Tier 5 approval
claims.authority: No behavior unlock, automatic runtime mode, pressure, fill, PI, weighting, or controller change is authorized.
